Experience curated rewards and privileges with your Kotak Solitaire Credit Card
Earn while you travel: Get 10 Air Miles for every ₹100 spent on flight and hotel bookings made through Kotak Unbox.
Everyday purchases: Earn 3 Air Miles per ₹100 spent on other purchases.
Make the most of your Air Miles
Redeem it for flights, hotel stays, merchandise, or transfer them to our partner miles.
Travel bookings: 1 Air Mile = ₹1 when redeeming for flights, and hotels on Kotak Unbox
Other redemptions: 1 Air Mile = ₹0.5 for vouchers.  Click here for list of vouchers
Partner miles: Convert Kotak Air Miles to airline/hotel miles. Click here for conversion ratios.
Please click here to know the steps on how to access Kotak Unbox.
Note:
Earnings on travel spends via Kotak Unbox is capped at 1,00,000 Air Miles per statement cycle. Once capping is reached, customer will still continue to earn base air miles (i.e., 3 for every ₹100 spent).
No Air Miles will be earned on Rent, Wallet, Fuel, Utility & Telecom, Insurance, Education, Government (except tax payments) , Digital Gaming, and International spends.
Minimum 500 Air Miles are required for redeeming on travel bookings, and vouchers.
Minimum 2,000 Air Miles are required for partner miles transfer.
Air Miles expire after 3 years from the date of credit.

Frequently Asked Questions
1. What is the form factor of the card?
Kotak Solitaire Credit Card is a metal card.
2. How many add-on cards can I have?
Customer can get up to 3 add-on cards, in addition to one primary Credit Card. Add-on Card holder should be 18 years and above. Add-on card can only be issued to immediate family members of primary cardholder.
3. Will the add-on cards also be metal cards?
Yes. All Solitaire Credit Cards, including add-on cards, will be metal.
4. What is the Joining or Annual Fee for the Credit Card?
As a privileged member of the Kotak Solitaire Program, there is no Joining or Annual fee for you. However, if you are downgraded from the Solitaire program, an annual fee of ₹25,000 + GST will be charged.
5. What are the charges for forex transactions?
There will be no mark-up fees on international transactions.
No Air Miles will be accrued on International transactions.
6. What are the charges for ATM cash withdrawal?
1% Cash withdrawal charges will be applied. Additionally, there will be no interest/APR charges till the payment due date for cash withdrawals.
7. What are the charges for cash withdrawal in a foreign country?
1% Cash withdrawal charges will be applied. Additionally, there will be no interest/APR charges till the payment due date for cash withdrawals.
8. How can I activate my card?
To activate your Card:
1. Log in to the Kotak Mobile Banking App
2. Select the "Credit Card" tab
3. Click on “Card Controls”
4. Click on “Generate PIN”
5. Enter your details & submit
You can also activate your credit card by updating card controls and making a transaction.
9. How will I earn Air Miles on the card?
Solitaire cardholders will earn:
10 Air Miles for every ₹100 spent on Kotak Unbox Platform across following categories:
A. Flight & Flight Add-on Booking
B. Hotel & Hotel Add-on Booking
3 Air Miles for every ₹100 spent on all other Spends (barring exclusions)
Note: The transaction amount will be rounded down to the lowest multiple of ₹100. E.g., for a transaction amounting to ₹12,345 Air Miles will only be credited for ₹12,300 (lowest multiple of ₹100).
10. Will I earn Air Miles on International transactions?
No, you will not earn Air Miles on International transactions.
11. Will I earn Air Miles on EMI transactions?
No, you will not earn Air Miles on EMI transactions.
12. Is there any category where I will not earn Air Miles?
Air Miles will be accrued for following categories (exclusions):
Utility/Telecom (4812, 4814, 4899, 4900)
Insurance (5960, 6300)
Education and Government (8211, 8220, 8241, 8244, 8249, 8299, 9211, 9222, 9223, 9399, 9402, 9405, 9950) {except tax payments, 9311}
Rent (6513)
Fuel (5172, 5541, 5542, 5552, 5983)
Wallet Loading (6540)
Gaming & gaming digital (5816, 7994)
EMI
Cash Advance
International Transactions
13. Is there any capping on how many Air Miles I can earn on the card?
Accelerated Air Miles earned on travel spends done on Kotak Unbox Platform will be capped at 1,00,000 Air Miles per statement cycle. However, post reaching the limit customers would still earn 3 Air Miles per ₹100.
E.g.: If a customer spends 14,28,571 on Flight, Hotel, and add-ons via Kotak Unbox in a statement cycle, they will reach the limit of 1L Air Miles in the cycle. Any spends done beyond that will accrue 3 Air Miles for every ₹100 spent (barring exclusions).
14. When will the Air Miles reflect in my account?
Air Miles will reflect in your account within 5 days of transaction settlement.
15. How can I redeem Air Miles on the card?
The Cardholder may redeem the Air Miles for:
1. Travel Booking on Kotak Unbox
2.  Non-travel spends like Vouchers, Gift Cards on Kotak Unbox
3. Transfer to respective Hotel/Airline Partners on Kotak Unbox
16. What is the redemption rate of Air Miles on the Card?
Option1: Air Miles Redemption Value for Travel Booking on Kotak Unbox
1 Air Mile = ₹1 redemption value on Flight, Hotel, and Add-on Bookings on Kotak Unbox
Option 2: Air Miles Redemption Value for Non-Travel Spends like Vouchers, Gift Cards on Kotak Unbox
1 Air Miles = ₹0.5
Option 3: Air Miles Conversion into respective Hotel/Airline Partners on Kotak Unbox

17. Is there a capping on how many Air Miles I can redeem?
For Travel bookings on Kotak Unbox
Minimum 500 Air Miles are required in order to make Flight & Hotel Bookings
Customer will have an option to decide how much he/she wants to pay via Air Miles & Solitaire Credit Card
For Vouchers on Kotak Unbox
Minimum 500 Air Miles are required for purchasing Vouchers
Customer will also have an option to decide how much he/she wants to pay via Air Miles and Credit Card
For Miles transfer to partner Airlines/Hotel
Minimum 2,000 Air Miles required for transferring into respective Hotel and Airline Partners
No max capping on transferring Air Miles to partner Hotel & Airline Partners
18. Are there any charges on redemption of Air Miles?
No, there will be no redemption charges for the Air Miles
19. How many lounge visits do I get?
Primary & Add-on cardholders will get Unlimited Domestic & International Lounge Access. Additionally, Primary card holder also gets lounge access for their guest limited to 2 Domestic & 2 International lounges in a year.
20. How to access a lounge?
Solitaire cardholder must present their Card at the time of utilizing the lounge, along with a valid boarding pass & govt. ID proof
21. Is there any fuel surcharge waiver on the card?
Cardholders get 1% waiver across all petrol pumps in India. The waiver will only be applicable on transactions between ₹400-7,500 and will be capped at ₹10,000 in an anniversary year.

Features and Benefits of Indian Oil Credit Card By Kotak Bank
Let rising fuel prices not come in between your dreams to travel the roads less known. Introducing The IndianOil Kotak Credit Card, made for those who want to get the most of their travel every day. Enjoy a rewarding experience on Fuel, Dining, Groceries and much more. Save up to 5%* on IndianOil fuel spends!
Save 5%* on IndianOil fuel spends
2%** back as Reward Points on Grocery and Dining spends
0.5% back as Reward Points on all other spends
1000 Reward Points*** as welcome benefit on spending INR 500 # within 30 days of card issuance
Kotak Mahindra Bank has joined hands with IndianOil Corporation Limited to launch a fuel based card. IndianOil Kotak Credit Card offers customers savings upto 5% on IndianOil fuel transactions. Customer will also save 2% when using the card for Dining & Grocery spends.
Best Rewards with IndianOil Kotak Credit Card
Save 4% as Reward Points on IndianOil Fuel Spends. Earn 24 Reward Points on every INR 150 spent, capped at 1200 Reward Points per statement cycle ###
Save 2% back as Reward Points on Grocery and Dining spends. Earn 12 Reward Points on every INR 150 spent, capped at 800 Reward Points per statement cycle
On all other spends, save 0.5% back as Reward Points. Earn 3 Reward Points on every INR 150 spent
Get 1000 Reward points as welcome benefit on spending INR 500 within 30 days of card issuance
All UPI on Credit Card transactions will accrue 0.5% Reward Points on every INR 150 spent, across spend categories.
Annual Fee Waiver
Annual fee of INR 449 waived on spending INR 50,000 in the previous anniversary year
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between INR 100 to INR 5000 with maximum surcharge waiver of INR 100 per statement cycle only at IndianOil outlets ###
Add-on Card
Get a free Add-on card which will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your primary credit card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Rupay Benefits
Concierge services
You can avail personal concierge and assistance by calling 1800-26-78729 for the same. Applicable on Rupay Variant Only.
*5% savings is calculated as 4% back in the form of Reward points and 1% back as Fuel Surcharge waiver
**2% back on Dining & Groceries is valid only on select merchant categories - 5812, 5814, 5813, 5411, 5311, 5399, 5422, 5451, 5499 & 5441
***Applicable only on Credit Card with Joining Fees
#Valid on a single transaction of INR 500 or above to be eligible for joining benefit
##IOCL Petrol Pump Locator: https://locator.iocl.com/
### this feature is not applicable on UPI transactions
Redeem your Reward points through any of the following options -
Kotak Rewards
Introducing Kotak Rewards* - your new point redemption currency that simplifies managing Reward Points on your Kotak Credit Cards . Redeem your accrued reward points at 25p/point against our exclusive catalogue of benefits.
Choose from various categories like merchandise, e-vouchers of latest brands, movie vouchers, travel, mobile recharge and much more. Redeem Now T&C Apply.
*The portal is governed by a separate set of Terms & Conditions
Redeem as Cashback
Call Kotak Customer Care at 1800 4100
Validate yourself & place a request to redeem your points. Redeem your accrued reward points at 20p/point as cashback. Minimum 2000 points will be required to avail this redemption facility.
Your request will be processed within 2 working days & you will receive a confirmation on your registered contact details.
For more information, refer FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a fuel credit card?
A fuel credit card is a credit card that is specifically designed to benefit customers when used at Fuel Pumps. These credit cards typically offer rewards and incentives for fuel purchases, such as Reward Points, Cashback, etc.
With a fuel credit card, you can use it to purchase petrol, diesel, etc. or other fuels at participating fuel stations. You can also use it for other spends like dining, groceries etc. depending on the features of the card.
How to get Indian oil credit card?
Customers can Click Here to apply for IndianOil Kotak Credit Card.
Is it a good option to apply for fuel credit card?
This depends on usage and preference. If you frequently fuel your vehicle, you should consider a fuel card that helps you earn rewards every time your refuel your vehicle. This card helps save money on a category where spends pertain to a significant amount.
Is it better to use a fuel credit card or a normal credit card?
Depends on your spending patterns on fuel specifically. A fuel credit card can be a choice if you frequently purchase fuel and helps you earn significant rewards or discounts. Fuel credit cards offer higher rewards or discounts for fuel purchases than regular credit cards.
How can I avail Joining Benefit against my IndianOil Kotak Credit Card?
Joining benefit is applicable only on realization of Joining Fee. IndianOil Kotak Credit cardholders need to perform one transaction of INR 500 or above within 30 days of card issuance to be eligible for welcome benefit of 1000 Reward points. The benefit will be credited within 3 months of completing the transaction.

Zen points will only be earned on spends up to ₹ 40,000 per statement cycle
Wallet Load, Fuel, Rent, Online skill based gaming
Zen points earnings against these spend categories will be discontinued
Kindly note:
a. Spends on above categories will not be considered when calculating milestone benefits
b. The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Shop more and earn more Zen Points
The Zen Credit Card will complement the shopper in you. Every time you spend ₹150 on Shopping (Apparels, Lifestyle goods, Departmental Stores & Jewellery), you earn 10 Zen Points.
On all your other spends, you earn 5 Zen points – except on Wallet Load, Fuel, Rent, Online skill-based gaming and the transactions that you convert to EMI.
Bonus Zen points
Earn 7500 Zen points on annual spends of ₹3,00,000 and additional 7500 Zen points on annual spends of ₹6,00,000
For more details check out the Milestone tab click here
Welcome Gift
You can avail of a welcome gift of 1500 Zen points. This gift can only be realized upon paying the joining fees of ₹1500/-. It is not available on the free card
Domestic Lounge Access
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, customer needs to meet the quarterly spends of ₹75,000 or more to enjoy 2 Domestic Airport Lounge accesses in the next calendar quarter
Enjoy benefits such as gourmet meal, comfortable seating, widescreen TVs, newspaper and magazines, free Wi-Fi.
For list of lounges, Click here
Click here for applicable terms and conditions on Lounge Access.
International Lounge Access
3 complimentary* access per calendar year to Priority Pass International Lounges outside India
Get access to over 1300+ lounges by simply swiping your Kotak Zen Credit Card
Only the Primary Cardholder is eligible for the complimentary visits .
*Important Terms and conditions:
Complimentary visits are applicable only for the primary card holders.
Visit validation charges of $1 will be debited. These will be credited back to your card within 7 working days.
USD 35 per person per visit will be charged for the guest.
After completion of the complimentary visits or access without meeting eligibility criteria, USD35 will be applicable for the primary holder as well.
For International Lounge Directory, Click here
Good news! Enjoy access to international lounges directly with your Kotak Credit Card. Priority Pass Card will no longer be required. W.e.f June 02, 2023, issuance and renewal of Priority Pass Card will be discontinued.
Credit Cards issued till June 01, 2023
Priority Pass Cards can be used till June 19, 2023. From June 20, 2023, simply activate International transactions (Online & in store/ POS) using your Kotak Bank Mobile App or Net Banking and use your Kotak Credit Card.
Credit Cards issued after June 01, 2023
Simply activate International transactions (Online & in store/ POS) using your Kotak Bank Mobile App or Net Banking and use your Kotak Credit Card. Please note that cards issued post June 01, 2023 can access international lounges starting June 20, 2023.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on transactions that range between ₹500 and ₹5000, allowing you to avail a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of up to ₹3,500 in an anniversary year.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge of 1.8% for transactions on www.irtc.co.in and 2.5% for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. The maximum railway surcharge waiver that is allowed in a anniversary year is ₹500/-.
Priority attend
We value your time. Instead of you trying to reach us, we will reach you.
SMS "KASSIST" to 5676788 and we will call back within two hours.
We make it easy for you to pay your monthly dues.
Call for complimentary cheque pickup
Add-on Card
Your Add-on Card will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your credit card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Click here to apply now for an Add-on Card.

Kotak Solitaire Business Credit Card - Where your Expense Unlocks Exclusive Rewards
Experience a credit card designed to match your business ambitions. Enjoy curated privileges and accelerated rewards on your spends.
Accelerated Rewards on Travel:  Earn 7X Reward Points (every ₹150 spent) on flight and hotel bookings made via the Kotak Unbox platform
Smart Rewards Across Spend Categories - Make every transaction work for you
Earn 1 reward point on every  ₹150 spent on special categories*
Earn 2 reward points on every  ₹150 spent elsewhere
Redemption Made Rewarding
1 Reward Point = ₹0.50 when redeemed via the Kotak Unbox platform
Kotak Unbox Platform: Customers can redeem up to 100% of the cart value using reward points on the Unbox platform.
Click here to view detailed terms & conditions related to Reward Point transfer and redemption on the Kotak Solitaire Corporate Credit Card.
NOTE:
*Special categories includes transactions on utility bills, groceries, insurance premiums, government payments (including taxes), and railway bookings
Rewards earned on special categories are capped at 1000 points per statement cycle
Reward points are not applicable on EMI transactions, international spends, and select categories including rent, wallets, fuel, and education
Redemption to vouchers, merchandise, catalogue, and partner miles transfer will be live soon
Minimum 500 reward points are required for redemption
Accelerated reward points earned through travel spends on Kotak Unbox Platform are capped at 1,00,000 Reward points per statement cycle
Relax in style with exclusive airport lounge access
Benefit
Lounge list
How to access
International Lounge Access Powered by Priority Pass
1 complimentary international lounge visit per year
Click Here
Present your Kotak Solitaire Business Credit Card / digital QR code via Priority Pass App
Domestic Lounge Access
1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per quarter
Click Here
Present your Kotak Solitaire Business Credit Card at the lounge
International Lounge Access:
Visit validation charge of $1.00 will be debited and automatically reversed within 7 working days
Activate international transactions (online and in-store/ POS) using your Kotak Bank Mobile App or Net Banking to enable visit validation transaction
Domestic Lounge Access:
Visit validation charge of ₹ 2 will be applicable at the lounge.
Click here  for detailed Terms & Conditions on lounge access.

Joining Gift
Reward points worth Rs. 500, post realization of joining fee.

Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on transactions that range between ₹ 500 and ₹ 4,000, allowing you to avail a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of up to ₹ 3,500 in an anniversary year. Fuel transactions will not earn reward points.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge waiver for transactions on www.irctc.co.in and for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in an anniversary year is Rs. 500/-.
Customers will not earn reward points on railway transactions
Add-on Card

Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Milestone Feature
Spend Rs. 1, 25,000 every 6 months and get 4 free PVR tickets or 10000 reward points:
Redemption Option 1:
Enjoy a maximum of 8 free PVR tickets every year
PVR tickets can be used for any day and any show and are transferrable.
Star Pass Code will be issued which can be redeemed for online PVR Movie Ticket booking at www.pvrcinemas.com
You can claim your PVR tickets within 3 months after the program period gets over
Redemption Option 2:
Reward points will be credited in the next billing cycle
Reward points can be used for a host of redemption options like Airtickets, Movie Tickets, Mobile Recharge / Branded Merchandise
You can claim your reward points within 3 months after the program period gets over
If price of the ticket is more than Rs. 400, the difference amount shall be paid by the cardholder along with booking/convenience fees.PVR tickets will not be applicable for customers who fall under non - PVR location city.PVR movie tickets can be redeemed online only on www.pvrcinemas.com. PVR movie tickets cannot be redeemed at Box office.
For milestone benefits, all transactions settled during milestone period will be considered. Example- Milestone period is 1st Jan 2021 to 30th June 2021, then the transactions settled till 30th June 2021 will be considered for milestone benefits”. Any transaction settled after 30th June 2021 will be considered in next milestone period.

Eligibility Criteria
Primary Cardholder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 60 years. Add-On Cardholder should be 18 years & above
Location - Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Chennai, Delhi (including Gurgaon and Noida), Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Navi Mumbai and Pune
Income - Rs.5 Lakhs and above per annum
Should be a resident of India

Frequently Asked Questions
How can I activate my Kotak League Credit Card?
To activate your card. Follow below steps
Log in to new Kotak Mobile Banking App
Click on “Wallet” Icon or click on “Credit Cards”
Click on “Card Controls”
Click on “Generate Card PIN”
Generate your new Card PIN by entering details
You can also activate your card by updating card controls or making a transaction or by giving missed call on 76690 10000

How can I earn reward points on my Kotak League Credit Card?

4 Reward points per ₹150 spent on all eligible spends
8 Reward points per ₹150 spent on special merchant categories: Travel Agencies & Tour Operators | Package Tour Operators | Airlines and Air Carriers | Electric Sales | Durable Goods | Departmental Stores
8 Reward points per ₹150 spent on all eligible spends of 2 lakhs & above in a card anniversary year
T&C* applicable

Watching the most loved Movies at the Big Screens has never been this inviting!
Get 1 PVR INOX Movie Ticket on every spend of ₹10,000 in a monthly billing session
Get 20% discount on food and beverages every time
Get 5% discount on movie tickets  every time
Get access to premium PVR INOX lounges
Zero joining fees
For Movie Lovers, there’s never been a more complete companion than the PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card . The movie watching experience has never been so wholesome! Your tag-along for the movies offers not just ample Movie Tickets but also helps you indulge yourselves with discounted Food & Beverage at the cinemas!
Enjoy Unlimited Movie Tickets with your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card!
Get 1 PVR INOX Movie Ticket on every Spend of Rs. 10,000 in a monthly billing cycle
Earn tickets worth Rs. 300 each for achieving every Spends Milestone* of Rs. 10,000
*Exclusion on spends – All spends on Rent Payments, Wallet funding, Online-skill based Gaming
For Detailed TnC, please refer to /content/kotakcl/en/personal-banking/cards/credit-cards/mitc-and-ca.html
Monthly Billed Spends

For example –
If the Monthly Spends is Rs. 22,000 –the customer is eligible for 2 tickets
If the monthly Spends is Rs. 75,000 - the customer is eligible for 7 tickets
If the monthly Spends is Rs. 1,05,000 - the customer is eligible for 10 tickets
Once eligible, the tickets(M-Coupons) can be claimed from the Kotak Mobile Banking App / Net Banking; for detailed steps to redeem, please refer to the “Claim your PVR INOX Coupon” tab on the Kotak Website
The value of each M Coupon is capped at Rs. 300
Eligible codes for any given month have to be claimed within 2 monthly billing cycles
M Coupons once claimed can be used to book Movie tickets on the PVR App/Website
The tickets are valid for a period of 60 days from the date of claim(Date of claim refers to the date on which the customers have claimed M Coupons)
M Coupons can be used to book Movie Tickets of ANY FORMAT, ANY THEATER and ANY CATEGORY.
Discounts galore at PVR INOX Cinemas!
Get a flat 20% discount on Food & Beverages at any PVR INOX theater or on the PVR INOX App/Website on your next visit to the Movies!
Get a flat 5% discount on Movie Tickets at any PVR INOX theater or on the PVR INOX App/Website for your next visit to the Movies!
Feel the glitz and glamour!
Use your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card to visit the In-Cinema Lounges for no additional cost to enter (Any purchase within the lounge has to be borne by the Cardholder).
Your PVR INOX Tickets Are Waiting! Redeem them now to enjoy the latest movies on the big screen!
To redeem your movie ticket vouchers (known as M-Coupons), please follow these steps on the Kotak Mobile App
Login to MB App / Kotak Net Banking section
Go to Credit Card Overview Section
Select PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card
Select PVR INOX Coupon Claim / Unlock PVR INOX coupons, enter the month eligible
Get M-Coupons eligible for the month
View the Validity of the M-Coupons
Use them at PVR INOX Cinemas
Once claimed, all coupons are stored in the My PVR INOX section within the card overview section on the Kotak Mobile App with the coupon details mentioned such as
M coupon code
Issue date
Validity date
Please note that customers can claim the M Coupon for a period of 2 months only post the eligible billing cycle (included). Visit the “How to use” section to know more about how to use these codes at PVR App/Website.
Please follow the below steps to use your Coupon Code and get your PVR INOX Movie Ticket(s). Using features on your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card
Booking movie tickets using your M-Coupons
Log on to the PVR App or Website.
Choose your preferred cinema, movie, show, and seats.
Scroll down to select "PVR Exclusives" (on the App) or "Avail Offers" (on the Website)
Select the M-Coupon option under “PVR Exclusives”
Enter the last 5 digits of your registered mobile number and the last 4 digits of your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card
Enter your Coupon Code(s) and click on "Make Payment".
1 M-Coupon can be redeemed only against 1 movie ticket only
The value of the m coupon is capped at Rs. 300. If the price of the ticket is more than Rs. 300, the difference in amount will have to be borne by the customer
Pay the balance booking/convenience fees using your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card and book your ticket
Taxes as applicable and levied for the booking must be paid by the Cardholder during the booking
Availing discounts on Movie Tickets and Food and Beverages on your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card.
Availing the Movie Ticket / FnB (Food and Beverage) discounts on the PVR App/Website.
Follow the below steps to avail discount related features on the PVR App
Log on to the PVR App or Website.
Choose your preferred cinema, movie, show, and seats as well as FnB choices, if any, to proceed to the “Checkout Page” to view the booking summary
Payment Page – On the payment page, click on “Bank Offers”
Bank Offers section – Click on “PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card”
PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card – Enter your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card details for verification
Once verified that the card is a PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card, the discount is applied and the discounted booking amount is shown
Pay the discounted booking amount using your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card to complete the transaction
Taxes as applicable and levied for the booking must be paid by the Cardholder during the booking
Availing the Movie Ticket / FnB (Food and Beverage) discounts at PVR INOX Theatres across India
On your visit to the PVR INOX theatres, proceed towards the ticket counter stationed at PVR INOX theatres
For Ticket booking - Select your preferred Movie, Show and seats
For FnB booking – Select your preferred choice of Food and Beverage options
At the booking counter, use your “PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card” to view the discounted booking amount
Pay the discounted booking amount using your PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card to complete the transaction
Taxes as applicable and levied for the booking must be paid by the Cardholder during the booking

The White Credit Card also comes with Visa payWave that offers a fast, safe and secure way to pay.
×
Just wave and pay with no PIN.
Enjoy the comfort of this contactless way to pay for transactions up to ₹5000, without a PIN.
Why contactless payments?
Speed: You don't need to enter a PIN, just wave your credit card on the reader*.
Safety: The credit card never leaves your hand, reducing the risk of loss or counterfeit.
Security: Multiple layers of security ensures no fraudulent or unauthorized transactions.
How does the PayWave Credit Card work?
Look for the Visa PayWave mark and contactless logo on the POS machine
Check the amount entered on the contactless reader
Tap your credit card over the reader at close range over the logo
A message and 4 beeps indicates a successful transaction
*The requirement for PIN entry on the POS terminal at the merchant outlet is a function of country specific regulations and is subject to change. PIN input is not mandated for purchases below the permissible local limit.
Please note that the permissible transaction limit for usage of credit cards in contactless mode in India is mandated by RBI and may change from time to time based on the latest regulations. As per RBI notification on Additional Factor authentication for contactless transactions dated Dec 4, 2020, PIN input is not required on the POS terminal at the merchant outlet for contactless transactions up to a maximum value of ₹5,000 per transaction. Additionally, beyond this transaction limit (above ₹5,000), the card has to be processed in Chip & PIN mode and authentication with PIN is mandatory.

Kotak Biz Edge Credit Card
Kotak BizEdge Credit Card
Give your business the edge it deserves
×
Features
Rewards
Fees & Charges
FAQs
More
Crafted for today’s trailblazers
Exciting Reward Points
Earn  5X reward points  on business essential spends, flights & hotels bookings
Business partnerships
Earn  5X reward points on SAAS related spends  through our partnership with *Nuclei platform
Extended interest-free period
Manage your cash flow efficiently with the extended  55 days of interest free period
Annual fee waiver
Spend ₹ 2 Lakh in an anniversary year & get your  annual fee waived off
Seamless UPI payments
Link your RuPay Credit Card to your preferred UPI app & pay on the go
* Click here   to explore SAAS offers on Nuclei (only applicable to BizEdge VISA variant)
Empower your ambitions—earn faster, go further with Kotak BizEdge’s accelerated rewards
Earn on business essential spends: Get 10 reward points for every ₹150 spent on business essentials*
Earn rewards with our preferred partner: Get 10 reward points on SAAS related spends for every ₹150 spent on the Nuclei Platform**
Earn while you travel: Get 10 Reward points for every ₹150 spent on flight and hotel bookings made through Kotak Unbox.
Earn on other purchases:   Get up to 2 reward points for every ₹150 spent across other categories
Make the most of your Kotak BizEdge Credit Card
1 Reward Point = ₹ 0.25 for purchases via the Kotak Unbox platform
On the Kotak Unbox Platform, redeem up to 80% of the cart value using reward points.
Note
*Spendings on Business essentials includes transactions on tax payments, utility bills, insurance premiums, government payments, fuel, office supplies, telecom services, electronic purchases.
** The rewards points on SaaS spends via Nuclei are not available on RuPay variant.
Rewards earned on Business essential spends are capped at 2500 reward points per statement cycle
Accelerated reward points for spends on flight, hotel and SAAS transactions are capped at 1,00,000 reward points
Reward points can not be earned on EMI transactions, and select categories including rent, wallets, and education
Minimum 500 reward points are required for redemption
All the reward points earned are valid for 36 months only. The points will expire post this duration.
Click here  to know detailed terms & conditions related to Reward points on the Kotak BizEdge Credit Card.

Kotak 811 Credit Card
Easily convert hefty purchases to affordable EMIs. It's time to earn and spend in 'Rewards'
500 bonus reward points on spending Rs.3,000 within 30 days of card set-up
2 reward points against every Rs. 100 spent online
Annual fee waiver on retail spends of Rs. 50,000 in the previous anniversary year
3 PVR Tickets on spending Rs.75,000 in the previous anniversary year
Save fuel surcharge waiver of 1% across fuel stations
Rewards Points
Earn 2 reward points for every Rs.100 spent online
Earn 1 reward points for every Rs.100 spent offline
With effect 01 st June 2025, following changes will be applicable:
Reward points will only be earned on utility spends up to ₹35,000 per statement cycle
The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs). Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Reward Points will not be earned on transaction categories: Education, Wallet Loading, Fuel, Rent & Government, Insurance and Online Skill based Gaming
Welcome Benefit
Spend Rs.3,000 within the first 30 days of card issuance and receive 500 bonus reward points
Annual Fee Waiver
Annual fee of Rs. 500 waived on spending Rs. 50,000 in the previous anniversary year
Milestone Spends Benefit
Spend Rs.75,000/- in an anniversary year and get 3 complimentary PVR tickets
With effect 01 st June 2025, spends under Utility, Education, Wallet Loading, Government, Insurance, Online Skill based Gaming, Fuel and Rent will not be considered while calculating milestone benefits
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
With effect from 01 st June 2025, 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on transactions that range between Rs.500 and Rs.4,000. Avail of a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of Rs.3,500 in each calendar year.
Fuel transactions are not eligible to earn any Reward points
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge of 1.8% for transactions on www.irctc.co.in and 2.5% for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters.
The maximum railway surcharge waiver that is allowed in a calendar year is Rs.500/-
Add-on Card
Your Add-on Card will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your Card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Click here to apply now for an Add-on Card.
Safety features
Embedded EMV Chip lends an additional level of security
6-digit PIN authentication for higher security of your transactions

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a credit card balance transfer?
Credit card balance transfer is the process of transferring owed balance from one credit card account to another. Upon carrying out this process, the debt is owed to the new card issuer as opposed to the original card issuer.

Features
Turn every spend into flight tickets. Earn accelerated IndiGo BluChips, enjoy lounge access, and unlock exclusive travel perks like never before. A card that matches your limitless wanderlust!

Welcome benefit of 4,000 IndiGo BluChips voucher & 6E Eats voucher
Spend-based milestone vouchers of up to 16,000 IndiGo BluChips
Enjoy Domestic lounge access, 8 per year (2 every quarter)
Welcome Benefits

Accelerated Earnings on IndiGo Website and Mobile App

8 IndiGo BluChips per ₹100 spent for all IndiGo BluChip members

Earnings on Other Categories

Milestone Benefits
Earn vouchers of up to 16,000 IndiGo BluChips each year
Earn a voucher worth 4,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending ₹1.5L within the anniversary year
Earn the 2 nd voucher worth 4,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending ₹4L within the anniversary year
Earn the 3 rd voucher worth 4,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending ₹7.5L within the anniversary year
Earn the 4 th voucher worth 4,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending ₹12L within the anniversary year

Complimentary access to 2 Domestic lounges per calendar Quarter

IndiGo Kotak Credit Card FAQs
What is IndiGo BluChip?
IndiGo BluChip is IndiGo’s new loyalty program. Customers will have a BluChip account registered with their mobile number and email ID, and all benefits of the IndiGo Kotak card (BluChips and vouchers) will be credited to this account.
What happens to my 6E Rewards balance?
If you were a 6E Rewards cardholder, by 3rd October ’25, all your 6E Rewards balance was converted to IndiGo BluChips with an 18% bonus and credited to your BluChip account. This bonus is exclusive to Kotak 6E Rewards cardholders to give them a kick-start with the new card.
What are the features of the new IndiGo Kotak CC?
The new IndiGo Kotak Cards are feature-rich. To take a glimpse, check our Value Chart and see what the card has to offer. Welcome benefit, IndiGo BluChips on every transaction, milestone benefit, renewal benefit, and domestic lounge access are available to cardholders.
Is there any capping on the IndiGo BluChips I can earn in a year?
No. You can earn IndiGo BluChips for every transaction you make without any capping.
Is there any criteria to be eligible for lounge access?
No. There is no eligibility criterion for lounge access on the card. Customers can avail 2 domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter .
I have recently paid the fee on my 6E Rewards card and I got a fee levied on my new IndiGo card as well. Please clarify.
If you have upgraded from the 6E Rewards card to the IndiGo Kotak Premium card, you will be subject to a new anniversary cycle, effectively reinitiating your card anniversary date. This means a joining fee will be levied for the month of October ’25, and upon payment, you will receive the welcome benefits.
If a customer was levied an annual fee on their 6E Rewards card from April ’25 onwards and has paid the fee within the due date, then they are eligible to receive:
700 IndiGo BluChips if they had a 6E Rewards card, post activating the new IndiGo card (within 30 days).
1500 IndiGo BluChips if they had a 6E Rewards XL card, post activating the new IndiGo card (within 30 days).
This is a compensatory upgrade bonus and will be credited to the customer’s BluChip account.
Where is my new IndiGo Kotak CC? I have not received the card yet.
You can find your virtual card in your Mobile Banking app, from where you can activate the card and access other details.
If your IndiGo Kotak physical card was dispatched to you, you would have received the dispatch SMS and tracking ID. If you have changed your address or moved to a new location, and want your card delivered to the new location, please follow these steps:
Update the new address details with the bank. Click here for updating it through Net banking or the old Mobile Banking app. If you are using the new Kotak Mahindra Mobile Banking app click here .
Then give a call to 1800 4100 for re-dispatch (charges apply).

What is IndiGo BluChip?
IndiGo BluChip is IndiGo’s new loyalty program. Each customer will have an IndiGo BluChip account registered with their mobile number and email ID, and all benefits of the IndiGo Kotak Credit Card (BluChips and vouchers) will be credited to this account. You will earn IndiGo BluChips for every transaction on IndiGo flight bookings, as well as on dining and entertainment.
What happens to my 6E Rewards balance?
If you were a 6E Rewards cardholder, all your 6E Rewards balance was converted to IndiGo BluChips with an 18% bonus by 3rd October ’25. It was credited to your IndiGo BluChip account. This bonus is exclusive to Kotak 6E Rewards cardholders so they can have a kick-start for the new card.
I was a 6E Rewards CC holder. What happens to my card now?
6E Rewards Credit Cards have been migrated to the new IndiGo Kotak credit card, maintaining the annual fee of the 6E Rewards Credit Card that you were holding.
If you had a 6E Rewards XL card (annual fee – Rs.1500), you would have received the IndiGo Kotak CC at a joining/annual fee of Rs.1500. All benefits of the new card are available to you.
If you had a 6E Rewards card (annual fee – Rs.700), you would have received the IndiGo Kotak CC at a joining/annual fee of Rs.700. All benefits, except joining and renewal benefits, are available to you.
What are the features and fees of the new IndiGo Kotak Credit Card?
The new IndiGo Kotak Cards are feature-rich. To take a glimpse, jump to our Value Chart and take a look at what the card has to offer. Welcome benefit, IndiGo BluChips on every transaction, milestone and renewal benefits are available to all cardholders.
If your 6E Rewards credit card was migrated to the new Indigo Kotak Credit Card, then the below is applicable for you:
For IndiGo 6E Rewards XL cardholders who were migrated to the IndiGo Kotak Credit Card, all benefits will be available. Joining/Annual fee will be Rs.1500.
For IndiGo 6E Rewards cardholders who were migrated to the IndiGo Kotak Credit Card, welcome and renewal benefits will NOT be available. All other benefits of the IndiGo Kotak card will be available. Joining/Annual fee will remain at Rs.700 until your card’s expiry.
Is there any capping on the IndiGo BluChips I can earn in a year?
No. You can earn IndiGo BluChips for every transaction that you do without any capping.
I have recently paid the fee on my 6E Rewards card and I got a fee levied on my new IndiGo card as well. Please clarify.
Post migrating to the new IndiGo Kotak Credit Card, customers will be subject to a new anniversary cycle, effectively reinitiating their card anniversary date. This means a joining fee will be levied for the month of October ’25, and upon payment, they will receive the welcome benefits (if applicable on the card they are holding).
If a customer was levied an annual fee on their 6E Rewards card from April ’25 onwards and they have paid the fee within the due date, then they are eligible to receive:
700 IndiGo BluChips if they had a 6E Rewards card, post activating the new IndiGo card (within 30 days).
1500 IndiGo BluChips if they had a 6E Rewards XL card, post activating the new IndiGo card (within 30 days).
This is a compensatory upgrade bonus and will be credited to the customer’s BluChip account.
Where is my new IndiGo Kotak CC? I have not received the card yet.
You can find your virtual card in your Mobile Banking app, from where you can activate the card and access other details.
If your IndiGo Kotak physical card was dispatched to you, you would have received the dispatch SMS and tracking ID. If you have changed your address or moved to a new location, and want your card delivered to the new location, please follow these steps:
U pdate the new address details with the bank. Click here for updating it through Net banking or the old Mobile Banking app. If you are using the new Kotak Mahindra Mobile Banking app click here .
Then give a call to 1800 4100 for re-dispatch (charges apply).
What do I get additional on upgrading to the premium variant?
The IndiGo Kotak Premium Credit Card comes with premium perks – More IndiGo BluChips for your transactions, complimentary airport lounge access, and more!
To know more about the premium variant, please click here .

How Can a Kotak Purchase Credit Card Help
Get your hands on the exclusive Kotak Purchase Credit Card, designed for centralised payment of miscellaneous administrative expenses, accounts payable, utilities and taxes, online marketing, and IT costs. It is issued in your company's name, offering corporate liability for payments. It is ideal for businesses seeking convenience and control, helps streamline vendor payments, excise duty payments, and enhances purchasing efficiency.
Here’s how Kotak Purchase Credit Card can be useful for your business:
Tax payments: Effortlessly manage tax obligations with a dedicated credit card for timely and secure payments.
GST payments: Streamline GST compliance and avoid late payment penalties with convenient credit card payments.
Utility payments: Consolidate electricity, water, and other utility bill payments for efficient expense management.
Employee reimbursements: Simplify expense claims and reimbursements with a corporate credit card for easy tracking and reconciliation.
Subscription payments: Manage recurring software, cloud service, and platform subscriptions efficiently through a centralised payment solution.
Key Features & Benefits of a Kotak Purchase Credit Card
Interest-Free Credit Period
Get an interest-free period of up to 48 days for bill payment.
Incentives and Rewards
Earn monthly incentives and rewards on all transactions on your card.
Dedicated Service Manager 24x7
Get a dedicated Relationship Manager and Service Manager for personalised assistance.
Worldwide Acceptability
Transact seamlessly across millions of merchants worldwide.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a Purchase Credit Card?
A Purchase Credit Card is specifically crafted to help businesses manage their expenses, such as paying vendors and purchasing office supplies. It comes with features like tracking expenses and flexible credit limits to streamline management.
What are Purchase Credit Card Benefits which you can avail?
The benefits of using Purchase Credit Cards include interest free period, waivers on fuel surcharges, a customisable credit limits, round the clock service managers and exclusive  on merchant transactions.
How can a business apply for a Purchase Credit Card?
To apply for a Purchase Credit Card, please click the “Apply Now” button and complete the required information. Our team will reach out to you to guide you through the next steps of the application process.
What expenses can be paid using a Purchase Credit Card?
A Purchase Credit Card can be utilised for a variety of business expenditures such as payments, accounts payable, centralised travel expenses, office supplies procurement, utility bills payment and other operational costs to facilitate efficient management within the business.

PVR Kotak Gold Credit Card
Wondering whom to take along for your next movie? Here’s your perfect MOVIE COMPANION– The PVR Kotak Gold Credit Card
A companion that not only gets you FREE MOVIE TICKETS but also PAYS for your POPCORN!
PVR Rewards
Get free PVR Movie Tickets depending on your monthly spends.
Add-on Card
Get an Add-on card and enjoy added benefits with it.
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Keep a track on the spends done through your Add-on card.
PVR Rewards
SWIPING WAS NEVER THIS ENTERTAINING!
Get 1 PVR INOX movie ticket* worth Rs. 400 every month when you spend ₹ 10,000 and above in a monthly billing cycle
Get 2 PVR INOX movie tickets* worth Rs. 400 every month when you spend ₹ 15,000 and above in a monthly billing cycle
Shop Anywhere in India using your PVR Kotak Credit Card to get your free PVR movie tickets. Available for ANY TIME , ANY DAY , ANY SHOW
THE MOST APPETISING DEALS!!
Get 20% instant discount on Food and Beverages at PVR INOX
Get 5% instant discount on Movie Tickets at PVR INOX
No Joining Fee for the first year!
Add-on Card
Your Add-on Card will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your Card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)

Utility
Education
Wallet Load
Rent
Online Based Skill Gaming

Note:
Aqua Gold Credit Card has been rebranded to Kotak811 Dream Different Credit Card effective 15th July 2020 onwards.
Card replacement & renewal for logo 210 (Kotak811 Dream Different Credit Card – Gold variant) :
Card replacement request can be placed by either the Primary cardholder or an Add-on cardholder. Irrespective of who is placing the request, both the cards will be replaced. Please note, if the same is initiated by the primary cardholder, both cards need to be active. The cards will be replaced from Gold variant to Platinum variant.
Card renewal is an automated process. In case a customer holds both Primary & Add-on cards, then both the cards will be renewed. Please note, if the primary card is due for renewal, then both cards need to be active. The cards will be renewed from Gold variant to Platinum variant.

Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card
Maximise your monthly savings while spending with up to 5% cashback on your Cashback+ Credit Card.
Features
Big Savings on Essentials
5% cashback on online food deliveries, groceries and entertainment
Fuel Up & Save
3% cashback on all fuel spends + 1% fuel surcharge waiver
Everyday Cashback
0.5% unlimited cashback on other eligible spends
Earn accelerated cashback
5% on online groceries & food deliveries
5% on online movie tickets and OTT subscriptions
3% on fuel spends across fuel stations
Earn base cashback
Unlimited 0.5% cashback on other eligible spends
For RuPay variant, UPI on CC spends will earn unlimited 0.5% cashback
UPI on CC spends will earn base cashback on all spends, except excluded Merchant Category Codes (MCCs)
Offline grocery, dining, and entertainment purchases will earn base cashback
Fuel surcharge waiver
1% fuel surcharge waiver will be available on transactions between ₹500 to ₹4000. Maximum waiver is allowed up to ₹3500 in an anniversary year.
Cashback not applicable on
Rent, B2B transaction, Utilities, Insurance, Education and Government, Wallet, Online skill-based gaming, and EMI
The restrictions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay.
Cashback value, capping, redemption, and expiry
Cashback earned on accelerated spends will be capped at 750 points per billing cycle
Cashback will be given basis the Merchant Category Code (MCC) on which spends is made. For more details, please refer to our T&C.
1 reward point is equivalent to ₹1 and will be earned only in multiples of ₹1
Unclaimed cashback will expire in 1 year
Network offers
To explore VISA Rewards offers on your cards, please  click here .
To explore RuPay Select offers on your card, please click here .
Please note:   All network offers are subject to the T&Cs of the merchants and network.
T&C apply
For detailed T&C of the product, please click here .
Please follow the steps mentioned here to redeem your cashback from the Kotak Unbox platform.
Please note : Accrued points can only be redeemed as cashback against statement outstanding. 1 point = ₹1. Minimum 500 points required for redemption.
PVR INOX Buy 1, Get 1 Offer
Your movie nights just got more exciting with this limited time offer on PVR INOX movie tickets.
Offer valid till 30 th  June 2026
How to redeem?
Visit www.pvrcinemas.com / PVR App OR www.inoxmovies.com / INOX App
This offer is available only on the online platforms mentioned above
Select your city, cinema, movie, show date, show time, and seats of your choice
Proceed to the Order Summary page and, under the Offers / Bank Offers section, select " Kotak Cashback+ BOGO Offer "
Enter your card details and click on " Apply " to avail the offer.
Share your consent by checking " I accept the offer Terms & Conditions and PVR booking policy ."
A pop-up message saying “ Congratulations! You have successfully availed your offer ” will appear
Maximum discount per card per month is capped at ₹250.
This offer can be used once per month on the Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card
If you have applied for the Kotak Cashback+ BOGO Offer but the transaction doesn’t go through, kindly wait for 20 minutes before retrying to avail the discount again
Things to remember:
Click here for Terms & Conditions
Offer valid till 30 th June 2026
Offer is valid only on bookings made digitally through the mentioned platforms
Offer can be availed once per card per month
BookMyShow offer
Enjoy 20% off up to ₹150 on minimum spends of ₹299 on BookMyShow.
Offer valid till 30 th  June 2026
How to redeem?
Visit https://in.bookmyshow.com/ / BookMyShow App
This offer is only available on online platforms as mentioned
Select your city, event, show date, show time, and seats of your choice
Proceed to the order summary page and click on “Apply Offers”
Select the “Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card” offer by clicking on “Apply”
Enter the Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card number and click on “Submit”
Continue with your payment with the added upfront discount

Frequently Asked Questions
What is the JF and AF of this card?
JF and AF of the card is ₹750 + GST
How many add-on cards can I have?
The cardholder can get up to 3 add-on cards, in addition to one primary Credit Card. Add-on Card holder should be 18 years and above.
What is the add-on card fee?
Add-on card will be issued free of cost.
What will the limit of the add-on card?
Add-on card will have the same limit as the primary card, but the add-on card limit is subsumed under the primary card limit.
What is the cash withdrawal limit on this card?
Cash withdrawal is not allowed on this card.
How can I activate my card?
To activate your Card:
1. Log in to the Kotak Mobile Banking App
2. Select the "Credit Card" tab
3. Click on “Card Controls”/”Generate PIN”
5. Enter your details & submit
You can also activate your credit card by doing a transaction, updating card controls etc.
What is the rewards earn rate on this card?
Accelerated Cashback:
5% on online groceries and food deliveries
5% on online movie tickets and OTT subscriptions
3% on fuel across all fuel stations
Non - Accelerated Cashback:
Unlimited 0.5% on other eligible spends. For the RuPay variant, eligible UPI on CC spends will also earn unlimited 0.5% cashback.
What are the rewards restricted categories?
Rent, B2B transaction, Utilities, Insurance, Education and Government, Wallet, Online skill-based gaming, and EMI
What is the rewards capping on this card?
You can earn up to 750 reward points/billing cycle on the accelerated categories and unlimited on non-accelerated categories.
Will the accelerated categories earn base rewards once the capping is met?
Accelerated categories will earn no reward points once the capping of 750 reward points/billing cycle is met.
What is the cashback redemption rate of 1 reward point?
1 reward point = ₹1
How can I redeem the earned reward point?
You can redeem the accrued reward points only as cashback on Kotak Unbox platform. For more details on the redemption process, please refer the “Claim your Cashback” section.
Are there any charges for rewards redemption?
No, redemption is free of cost
Is there fuel surcharge waiver on this card?
Yes, 1% fuel surcharge waiver for transactions between ₹500-₹4000 is available, with a waiver capping of ₹3500 in an anniversary year

Credit meets Convenience with Kotak UPI RuPay Credit Card. Link your card on UPI Apps & make payments instantly
Reward Benefit
Earn 3 Reward Points* per ₹100 spent
Credit Card on UPI
Enjoy facility of making UPI Payment with your credit card
Virtual Credit Card
Go-wallet free by making instant payments with your credit card
Lifetime Free Card
No Joining & Annual Fees for lifetime
UPI payment on Credit Card
Enjoy a seamless experience of making UPI Transactions with your Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual Credit Card on your preferred UPI Apps
For more information regarding how to make UPI Payments with your RuPay Credit Card, Click Here
Earn Reward Points
Earn 3 Reward Points* against every ₹100 spent.
Reward Points will be accrued for both UPI as well as Regular # Credit Card Transactions
Every 1,000 Reward Points will be equivalent to ₹100
Minimum 1000 Reward Points will be required for redemption
Please note, w.e.f. 01 st June 2025, the following changes will be applicable:
Categories
Revision on Reward Points
Utility Spends
Reward points can be only earned on utility spends up to ₹35,000 per statement cycle
Wallet Load, Online skill-based gaming, Insurance, Government, Rent, Education Spends, and Fuel
Reward point earnings against these spend categories will be discontinued
Kindly note:
a. Spends on above categories will not be considered when calculating milestone benefits
b. The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Lifetime Free Card
Lifetime Free Card with Zero Joining & Annual Fees
*Reward Points will not be accrued for transaction categories such as Rent, Fuel, Railway, Wallet Loading, EMI, Education and Balance Transfer. Additionally, w.e.f. 01 st June 2025, Insurance, Government, Online Skill based gaming transaction categories as well as Utility spends beyond 35,000 in a statement cycle will also not earn reward points.
#Regular Credit Card Transactions include Online/E-Commerce and International Transactions made virtually
Kotak UPI RuPay Credit Card will be issued as virtual only card and no physical card will be issued. For your convenience, the card details will be auto-registered in Kotak Mobile Banking App under Credit Card Section. To view card details, follow the below steps:
Login into Kotak Mobile Banking App
Go to “ Credit Card ” Section
Go to “ Card Overview ” Section
To enable E-Com/Online & International Transactions & manage card usage settings, please click on “ Card Control ” Tab under “ Card Overview ” Section in Kotak Mobile Banking App.
Unfold UPI Magic with Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual Credit Card. Link your card on UPI Apps & set UPI Pin for making UPI Transactions
For more information on how to link your RuPay Credit Card on UPI Apps, Click Here
Kotak Rewards
Introducing Kotak Rewards - your new point redemption currency that simplifies managing rewards points on your Kotak credit cards . Redeem your points across a variety of categories like Mobile Recharge, Shopping across 10,000 products, E-vouchers across various brands, Movies, Travel and many more! T&C Apply.
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, Cash Value for redemption will be revised from ₹0.10 to ₹0.07 per Reward Point; a minimum of 2,000 Reward Points will be required for cash value redemption. For redemption against other categories like Mobile Recharge, Shopping, etc., 1 Reward Point = ₹0.10
Redeem Now
Minimum age of customer should be at least 18 Years
Customer should be an existing Kotak Credit Card holder

Kotak Infinite Credit Card
The Kotak Infinite Credit Card is an ‘invite-only’ Credit Card, specifically tailored for individuals who settle for nothing but the best in class for everything they do. With this Credit Card, you get a plethora of benefits and privileges, including a personalized card, golf privileges and access to prestigious international events.
Personalised Card Design
Minimum credit limit of Rs. 10 Lakhs
A World of Exclusivity keeping your unique interests in mind
Complimentary* tee-offs at some of the finest golf courses in India, and around the world.
Kotak Infinite Credit Card – Designed after you
Kotak Infinite Credit Card is a 'By-Invite' credit card program, exclusively for Kotak Private Banking clients. Kotak Infinite Credit Card offers best in class reward program, personalized card, golf privileges and access to prestigious international events. This card has been designed especially for top of the pyramid customers, considering their lifestyle and high spending power.
Personalised Card Design
Kotak Infinite Credit Card is designed after you, which means it carries a unique hand crafted illustration of the cardholder image on face of the card.
Higher Credit Limit
Kotak Infinite Credit Card comes with minimum credit limit of Rs. 10 Lac and an instant credit limit increase* offer to support your big purchases through an additional spending limit.
*Limit increase offer above your assigned credit line is available at bank’s discretion on case-to-case basis, taking spend and payment pattern into consideration.
Golf Benefits
The game for the game changers
Simply escape the hustle and bustle of the normal routine with complimentary* tee-offs at some of the finest golf courses in India and World.
Get 2 complimentary round of golf in a month for the cardholder . Also, you can invite two friends for a complimentary round once in a quarter
* T&C apply. Kindly refer cardholder agreement for golf program details.
To book a round of Golf, please click on www.kotak.golftripz.com
Bonus reward points! #
Get 800 Reward points worth Rs 800 free every month with your Kotak Infinite Credit Card.
# Crediting of reward points in lieu of 2 free PVR tickets is an interim change in the feature of the card.
The benefits don’t stop
There's an even greater wealth of benefits and treats waiting for you with a Kotak Infinite Credit Card.
Domestic Lounge Access:
Get 4 complimentary visits every quarter to select lounges in India.  Know More
Instant Assistance through premium concierge services to you.
These services include:
Arranging reservations for hotel and dining
Flight ticketing assistance
Booking tickets for special events and performances
Spa & Fitness Centre information
Referral assistance
To Book or for any queries please call at +91 1135124242 or write to [email protected] available from 10 am to 8 pm on all days
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Save 1% fuel surcharge across all petrol pumps in India*
*Fuel Surcharge to be waived only for transactions between INR 400 and INR 7,500 with a maximum of up to INR 4,500 per calendar year.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Get 1.8% to 2.5% railway surcharge waiver when you book a ticket on www.irctc.co.in or through an Indian Railways booking counter**
*Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs 500
Know the fees and charges for the Kotak Infinite Credit Card.

Disclaimer : We have discontinued Wealth Infinite Credit Card for new sourcing and the information above is displayed for existing cardholders only. We are sure that our large bouquet of active products with attractive features and offers will match your expectation. Thank you for understanding.
Eligibility Criteria
Primary cardholder needs to have Kotak Wealth Management Banking Relationship
Primary Credit Card holder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 65 years. Add-on Card holder should be 18 years and above
Location - Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Chennai, Delhi (including Gurgaon and Noida), Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai and Pune
Should be a resident of India

Pay with Reward Points:
Pay without cash. Pay without card

Credit Card
White Reserve Credit Card
Kotak White Reserve. Exquisitely crafted in METAL.
Credit Card that provides a unique gateway to elite experiences, special rewards and all things superior and luxe.
×
Features
White Pass
Lounge Program
Concierge
Club Marriott
Value
Fees and Charges
Golf
More
White Pass
One card for unparalleled luxury
Simple Milestone Structure
No need to calculate points. Earn direct White Pass value on crossing spend milestones
Unmatched Value
Earn White Pass Value up to ₹ 2.5 lakh annually
Curated Redemption Catalog
Includes gift vouchers of premium brands, flights, hotels and more
Cashback
Redeem your White Pass balance for Cashback
Luxury Lifestyle Management Services
Get access to the most exclusive global events and experiences
Exclusive services
Curated services including travel bookings, personal shopping, restaurant reservations and many more
Mega Events
Get access to some of the most sought after events in the world
Everyday Gifting
Making every occasion unforgettable with personalized services like sending gifts and organizing birthdays
Curated Experiences
Event organization  and custom services to fit your individual needs
Club Marriott Membership
Applicable across 350 hotels and 1000 restaurants in Asia Pacific
Fine Dining
Up to 25% off on the food and beverage bills in India and up to 20% off across Asia Pacific
Luxury stays
Up to 20% off on Best Available Room Rates in India and Weekend Room Rates in Asia Pacific
Personal Care
Up to 20% off on Spa treatments in India
Celebration Certificates
3 certificates offering up to 50% off on F&B bills and 30% off on hotel stays
There’s much more to White Reserve
Enjoy unique benefits with your card
Metal Card
Exquisitely crafted in metal
Complimentary lounge access**
Unlimited lounge access at 1000+ airports across the world for primary and Add-on cardholders
Minimal Forex Markup
2% foreign currency markup on international spends
Golfing Privileges
2 Free golf rounds each month at select golf courses across the world for the primary cardholder
Other benefits
1% fuel surcharge* across all petrol pumps in India and complimentary Add-on cards
Important Considerations:
Get 1% fuel surcharge waiver across all petrol pumps in India. Applicable on transactions between value  of ₹400 and ₹7,500, allowing you to avail a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of up to ₹4,500 in a calendar year.
**Please note, w.e.f. 01st October, guest charges and charges after complimentary visits are exhausted, will be revised to $35 per guest, per visit.
***As per internal norms, customer can hold only one active White or White Reserve Credit Card. White Pass will not be credited if customer holds multiple active White and/or White Reserve cards.
For the White Reserve RuPay variant, please contact Customer Care or your RM during new card issuance or renewal.

Mojo Platinum Credit card
Say hello to your new best friend - Kotak Mojo Platinum Credit Card!
It is designed to make all your spends  more rewarding with features that will Raise.Your.Life.Game.
Choice on rewards
Earn Mojo points on spends done against every Rs. 100
Airport Lounge access
Enjoy Airport Lounge Access, Gourmet meals and much more
Fuel Surcharge waiver
We offer Fuel surcharge waiver upto Rs. 3500 annually
Annual Fees waiver
Get Annual Fees waiver at Rs. 1,00,000 spent with your Credit card
Joining Fees Waiver
Get Joining Fees waiver at Rs. 30,000 spent in 90 days with your Credit card
Mojo points
The Mojo Platinum Credit Card will nurture the shopaholic in you.
Earn unlimited 2.5 Mojo points for every Rs. 100 on online spends.
Earn unlimited 1 Mojo point for every Rs. 100 on all other spends – except on fuel & cash withdrawal
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, the following changes will be applicable:
Mojo points can be only earned on education and Insurance spends up to ₹70,000 per statement cycle each
Mojo points can be only earned on utility spends up to ₹50,000 per statement cycle
Mojo points can be only earned on government spends up to ₹40,000 per statement cycle
Mojo points earnings against Wallet Load, Fuel, Rent & Online skill-based gaming Spends will be discontinued
The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Milestone Gift
Get 2500 Mojo points every quarter on spending Rs. 75,000. Valid for the first year (since issuance) only.
For more details check out the Milestone tab. Click here
Effective 1st June 2025, Spends on Utility, Wallet Load, Fuel, Online skill-based gaming, Insurance, Government, Rent, and Education will not be considered when calculating milestone benefits
The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Complimentary Airport Lounge Access
Get 8 annual complimentary visits to select Airport Lounges, within India. Visits limited to 2 per quarter
For list of select lounges, please click here
For detailed terms and conditions on lounge access, please Click here
Please note, w.e.f. 1 st June 2025, customer need to spend ₹75,000 or more in a calendar quarter to enjoy 2 Airport Lounge accesses in the next calendar quarter
Joining Fees waiver
Get your Joining fees of Rs. 1,000 waived on spending Rs.30,000* in the first 90 days after card issuance.
*All eligible customers will receive joining fee waiver within 90-120 days from after card issuance
Annual Fees waiver
Get your annual fees waived on spending Rs. 1 lakh annually.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
The 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on transactions that range between Rs.500 and Rs.3,000. Avail of a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of Rs.3,500 in each anniversary year. Fuel transactions are not eligible to earn any Mojo points.
W.E.F. 1 st June 2025, 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable
on transactions ranging between ₹500 and ₹5,000.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge of 1.8% for transactions on www.irtc.co.in and 2.5% for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters.
The maximum railway surcharge waiver that is allowed in a anniversary year is Rs.500/-.
Priority attend
We value your time. Instead of you trying to reach us, we will reach you.
SMS "KASSIST" to 5676788 and we will call back within two hours
We make it easy for you to pay your monthly dues.
Call for complimentary cheque pickup
Add-on Card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
click here to apply now for an Add-on Card for a small fees of Rs. 299 only.
Safety features
Embedded EMV Chip lends an additional level of security
6-digit PIN authentication for higher security of your transactions
Credit Card that everyone is talking about
Rajendra Verma
The complimentary airport lounge access has been a game-changer for my travel experiences. It's such a relief to relax in luxury while waiting for my flights. Additionally, earning unlimited 2.5 reward points for every 100 spent online is fantastic. KotakMojo truly understands the needs of its customers!
Reviewed on 06/02/2023
Abhishek Mehta
Earning unlimited 2.5 reward points for every 100 spent online has been a delightful surprise. I've re- deemed these points for various re- wards, from gift vouchers to cash- backs. The first-year fee waiver was
a great incentive to apply for the card. Highly recommended!
Reviewed on 07/25/2023
Afreen Ahmed
As a frequent online shopper and traveler, the Kotak Mojo credit card has been a lifesaver. The complimentary airport lounge access is a luxury I never thought I'd have, but it's become an essential part of my trips and the fuel surcharge waiver of up to 3500 annually is incredibly beneficial during my road trips.
Reviewed on 10/19/2023

Urbane Gold Credit Card
We know you love to get more out of your money. With Urbane Gold Credit Card, you will get just that with 3 reward points on every Rs. 100 spent*. So start shopping and reward yourself, today!
Earn 3 Reward Points
Enjoy Reward Points on spends done against every Rs.100/- spent*.
Add-on Card
Get an add-on card and enjoy added benefits with it.
Free PVR tickets or Reward points
Avail Free PVR Tickets and many more rewards such as redemption on airmiles, air tickets, recharges etc.
Reward Points
Earn 3 reward points against every Rs. 100/- of retail spends
Every 1000 reward points have a redeemable worth of Rs. 100/-
Minimum 1000 points required for redemption
Please note, w.e.f. 01 st June 2025, the following changes will be applicable:
Reward points can be only earned on utility spends up to ₹35,000 per statement cycle
Reward points earnings against Wallet Load, Fuel, Online skill-based gaming, Insurance, Government,
Rent, Education spends will be discontinued
Cash Value for redemption will be revised from ₹0.10 to ₹0.07 per reward point, and a minimum of 2,000 reward points will be required for cash value redemption. For redemption against other categories like voucher, Shopping, etc., 1 reward Point = ₹0.10
The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Add-on Card
Your Add-on Card will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your Card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Milestone Feature
Spend Rs. 1, 00,000 in a year and get 4 free PVR tickets or 10,000 reward points
Redemption Option 1:
PVR tickets can be used for any day and any show and are transferrable
Star Pass Code will be issued which can be redeemed for online PVR Movie Ticket booking at www.pvrcinemas.com
You can claim your PVR tickets within 3 months after the program period gets over
Redemption Option 2:
Reward points will be credited in the next billing cycle
Reward points can be used for a host of redemption options like Airtickets, Movie Tickets, Mobile Recharge / Branded Merchandise
You can claim your reward points within 3 months after the program period gets over
If price of the ticket is more than Rs. 400, the difference amount shall be paid by the cardholder along with booking/convenience fees. PVR tickets will not be applicable for customers who fall under non - PVR location city. PVR movie tickets can be redeemed online only on www.pvrcinemas.com . PVR movie tickets cannot be redeemed at Box office.
Effective 1 st June 2025, Spends on Utility, Wallet Load, Fuel, Online skill-based gaming, Insurance, Government, Rent, Education will not be considered when calculating milestone benefits
For milestone benefits, all transactions settled during milestone period will be considered. Example- Milestone period is 1 st Jan 2021 to 30 th June 2021, then the transactions settled till 30 th June 2021 will be considered for milestone benefits”. Any transaction settled after 30 th June 2021 will be considered in next milestone period.
Check your eligibility for the Urbane Gold Credit Card.
Explore more credit card options that best suit your needs.
*Terms and Conditions apply
Disclaimer
Important Notification: Please note that effective 9th October 2012, your Milestone program benefit has changed from 1 free IndiGo ticket to 4 free PVR tickets.

Corporate Gold Card
The Kotak Corporate Gold Card is specifically designed for Corporates to help them manage their expenses better. This is done by providing them with a consolidated monthly statement, and the opportunity to clear any dues with one consolidated payment.
Higher reward point earnings
Redeem reward points easily by calling the customer service desk
Get fuel surcharge waiver across all petrol pumps in India
Monitor spending patterns of employees
International Credit Card
EASY REDEMPTION
Points can be redeemed every quarter
Cash rebate will be given through demand draft
FUEL SURCHARGE WAIVER
Waiver given between Rs. 500 to Rs. 3000
Maximum waiver of Rs. 3500 in a calendar year
EASE TO EMPLOYEES
No worries of late payment fees, dues to be paid
Spend on corporate card and your corporate will pay for you
POWER TO COMPANY
Increased control over spends
Opportunities for savings and budgeting
Reduced company costs
UNIVERSAL ACCEPTABILITY
Reaches to 10 million merchants across the globe
Digital currency to consumers, businesses, banks and government
INTEREST FREE FUNDS
Interest Free utilization of funds
Up to 48 days interest free credit period
Just like overdraft facility on credit cards
DECIDE YOUR OWN LIMIT
One company limit is assigned to the corporate
Under this corporate card decide the limit for the employees
It can vary from hierarchy, designation or by employee’s will
EASE OF EXPENSE
Swipe Kotak Corporate Card at various business related spend opportunities
Exhibitions & Conferences, Business & Executive meetings, Sales Meet, receptions and reunions, association meetings.
CONSOLIDATED PAYMENT
Only one payment for all the employee cards under the company
No individual payment to be done by employee
Employer has the power of payment
EMAIL STATEMENT
Monthly employee statements are sent for the reference
Email statements are sent to save our environment
EXPENSE MANAGEMENT
Vendor-wise tracking on the spends done by the employees
Budget your expenses according to the spends done on corporate cards
Statistical data provided for analysis on the expenses
Analyze the amount spent by each employee
Data can be retrieved to see which employee has spent where and how much
HASSLE-FREE SPENDS
Eliminate cash advances as company pays off employees’ spends
Hassle free spending without carrying forex
No records to be maintained by the employees viz. vouchers, travel tickets etc.
DEDICATED SERVICE MANAGER
PERSONALIZED service to all the corporate card members
Quick information on card details, card limits, card lost/stolen
PROGRAM ADMINISTRATOR
Program Admin acts as middle man between Kotak and Company
Any queries related to your payment due date, total due, damaged card, lost card can be done through single contact
REAL TIME ALERTS
Feel safe and secure with free SMS alerts on all transactions
Free Email alert on all transactions
FREE CARD REPLACEMENT
Call and replace your corporate card in case damaged, lost/stolen
No extra charge for replacing
Free replacement done anytime

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a credit card balance transfer?
Credit card balance transfer is the process of transferring owed balance from one credit card account to another. Upon carrying out this process, the debt is owed to the new card issuer as opposed to the original card issuer.
Why should I select a Kotak Credit Card?
Kotak Credit Cards symbolize the following guiding principles:
Simplicity
Kotak Credit Cards are simple to understand and use. We have taken special care to make them hassle free so that you can spend time on more important things in life that require your attention.
Transparency
Kotak Credit Cards are transparent in communicating upfront what the card offers and what you would have to spend for it, if at all. We have taken care that there will be no hidden charges associated with this card.
Relevance
Kotak Credit Cards have understood what you need the most from your credit card , and have been designed to give you only those benefits that are most relevant for you.
This promise from Kotak ensures that you only get the best from your credit card!

Do I have to use this card only for my official expenses?
This card is specifically meant for official purpose. However you can use this card for personal expenses which will purely depend on the policy of your corporate who has availed the CORPORATE CARD OPTION. This is more so as the consolidated bill will also include any personal spends done on a corporate card and the expenses for the same will have to be settled between you and your company.
