Corporate Platinum Credit Card
Bank the way you live, privileged. With Kotak Corporate Platinum Credit Card you can earn high rewards points every time you transact and get more out of your money.
Earn higher Reward Points
Easy Redemption
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Airport Lounge Offer
Ease to Employees
Power to Company
Universal Acceptability
Easy Redemption
Redeem your points by just calling the customer service desk
Points can be redeemed every quarter
Cash rebate will be given through demand draft
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Applicable on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3000.
Maximum fuel surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 3500.
Important Note : This Feature is applicable only on Paid Annual Fee Variant.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge waiver for transactions on www.irctc.co.in and for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 500/-
Important Note : This Feature is applicable only on Paid Annual Fee Variant.
Airport Lounge Offer
Get access to airport lounge with VISA airport lounge offer
Get 2 accesses per calendar quarter for primary cardholder only
Ease to Employees
No worries of late payment fees, dues to be paid
Spend on corporate card and your corporate will pay for you
Power to Company
Monitor spending patterns of employees
Increased control over spends
Opportunities for savings and budgeting
Reduced company costs
Universal Acceptability
International Credit Card
Accepted by over 10 million merchants across the globe
Digital currency to consumers, businesses, banks and government
Interest Free Funds
Interest Free utilization of funds
Up to 48 days interest free credit period
Similar to overdraft facility on credit cards
Decide your Own Limits
One company limit is assigned to the corporate
Corporates decide the card limit for employees
It can vary from hierarchy, designation or by employee's will
Ease of Expense
Swipe Kotak Corporate Card at various business related spend opportunities
Exhibitions & conferences, business & executive meetings, sales meet, receptions and reunions, association meetings
Consolidated Payment
Only one payment for all the employee cards under the company
No individual payment to be done by employee
Employer has the power of payment
Email Statement
Monthly employee statements are sent for reference
Option to choose email statements
Expense Management
Vendor-wise tracking on the spends done by the employees
Budget your expenses according to the spends done on corporate cards
Statistical data provided for analysis on the expenses
Analyze the amount spent by each employee
Data can be retrieved to see which employee has spent where and how much
Travel Adherence
Travel or expense policies will be adhered by the employees
No fraud claims can be done by employees
Prevents slippages while claiming or reimbursing
Provides insights if the employees are spending on the registered vendor
Hassle-free spends
Eliminate cash advances as company pays off employees' spends
Hassle free spending without carrying forex
No records to be maintained by the employees viz. vouchers, travel tickets, etc.
Dedicated Service Manager
Personalized service to all corporate card members
Quick information on card details, card limits, card lost/stolen. etc.
Program Administrator
Program Admin acts as middle man between Kotak and Company
Any queries related to your payment due date, total due, damaged card, lost card can be done through single contact
Real Time Alerts
Feel safe and secure with free SMS alerts on all transactions
Free email alerts on all transactions
Free Card Replacement
Call and replace your corporate card in case it is damaged, lost/stolen
No extra charge for replacing
Free replacement done anytime

Frequently Asked Questions
Why should I select a Kotak Credit Card?
Kotak Credit Cards symbolize the following guiding principles:
Simplicity
Kotak Credit Cards are simple to understand and use. We have taken special care to make them hassle free so that you can spend time on more important things in life that require your attention.
Transparency
Kotak Credit Cards are transparent in communicating upfront what the card offers and what you would have to spend for it, if at all. We have taken care that there will be no hidden charges associated with this card.
Relevance
Kotak Credit Cards have understood what you need the most from your credit card , and have been designed to give you only those benefits that are most relevant for you.
This promise from Kotak ensures that you only get the best from your credit card!

Do I have to use this card only for my official expenses?
This card is specifically meant for official purpose. However you can use this card for personal expenses which will purely depend on the policy of your corporate who has availed the CORPORATE CARD OPTION.
This is more so as the consolidated bill will also include any personal spends done on a corporate card and the expenses for the same will have to be settled between you and your company.

Cash withdrawal feature is not active on the card.

Features
Claim your Rewards
Milestone Program
Value Chart
Fees and Charges
More
Royale Signature Credit Card
Earn 4 reward points for every ₹150 spent on accelerated categories and 2 reward points on base categories
Enjoy complimentary domestic airport lounge access
Get 10,000 bonus reward points on crossing ₹4 lakhs spends OR 30,000 points on crossing ₹8 lakhs spends every anniversary year
Enjoy Annual Fee waiver on annual retail spends of ₹1,00,000
Reward Points
Earn 4 reward points on every ₹150 spent across accelerated categories – Hotels, Restaurants, Travel Agencies & Tour Operators, Package Tour Operators, Airlines and Air Carriers, and International Spends
Earn 2 reward points on every ₹150 spent across other eligible base categories
Please note, w.e.f. 01 st June 2025, the following changes will be applicable:
Categories
Revision on Reward Points
Education and Insurance
Reward points will only be earned on education and insurance spends up to ₹70,000 per statement cycle
Utility Spends
Reward points will only be earned on utility spends up to ₹50,000 per statement cycle
Government
Reward points will only be earned on government spends up to ₹40,000 per statement cycle
Wallet Load, Fuel, Rent, Online skill based gaming
Reward points earnings against these spend categories will be discontinued
Kindly note:
Spends on above categories will not be considered when calculating milestone benefits
The aforementioned revisions will be based on the Merchant Category Codes (MCCs), which are 4-digit numbers assigned to merchants or businesses by card networks such as VISA, MasterCard, and RuPay. Click here for the list of applicable MCCs.
Bonus Reward Points
Earn 10,000 Reward points on annual spends of ₹4,00,000 OR 30,000 Reward points on annual spends of ₹8,00,000
For more details check out the Milestone tab, click here
Domestic Lounge Access
Get 2 complimentary visits every quarter, to select Dream Folks Lounges only in India, by simply swiping your Credit Card
Enjoy benefits such as gourmet meal, comfortable seating, widescreen TVs, newspaper and magazines, free Wi-Fi.
For list of lounges,  Click here
Click here  for applicable terms and conditions on Lounge Access.
Please note, w.e.f. 1st June 2025, spend ₹75,000 or more in a calendar quarter to enjoy Airport Lounge access in the next calendar quarter.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Please note, w.e.f. 01st June 2025, 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on transactions that range between ₹500 and ₹5000, allowing you to avail a maximum fuel surcharge waiver of up to ₹3,500 in an anniversary year.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge of 1.8% for transactions on www.irtc.co.in and 2.5% for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. The maximum railway surcharge waiver that is allowed in an anniversary year is ₹500/-.
Add-on card
Your Add-on Card will have all the benefits that you enjoy on your  credit card
Set the spend limit on your Add-on Card as you desire
Track spends separately for each of your Add-on Card(s)
Click here  to apply now for an Add-on Card.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a credit card balance transfer?
Credit card balance transfer is the process of transferring owed balance from one credit card account to another. Upon carrying out this process, the debt is owed to the new card issuer as opposed to the original card issuer.

Privy League Signature Credit Card
This credit card is offered exclusively to privy customers of the bank and comes with a choice of lifestyle benefits. This premium Credit Card allows you to earn up to 5 reward points on spends at specific merchant categories. Your reward points can be redeemed against a host of options like movie tickets, air tickets, air miles, shopping and more.
Access to airport lounges through Priority Pass membership
Get 6400 bonus* reward points every quarter
Fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations in India
Concierge services
Rewards program (Paid Card)
For every Rs. 100 spent on credit card 5 reward points are earned for special categories and 2 on other retail spends.
Shopper’s Plan
Earn 5 Reward Points on select categories like apparels, grocery, consumer durable, multi-brand online and, departmental stores
Earn 2 on all other retail spends
Traveller’s Plan
Earn 5 Reward Points on select categories like airlines, hotels, duty free, international spends and travel agencies
Earn 2 on all other retail spends
Value of each reward point is 20 paise. A minimum of 2,000 reward points will be required for cash value redemption.
Rewards program (Free Card)
For every Rs. 100 spent on credit card 5 reward points are earned for special categories and 2 on other retail spends.
Shopper’s Plan
Earn 5 Reward Points on select categories like apparels, jewelry, consumer durable, restaurants, departmental stores
Earn 2 on all other retail spends
Traveller’s Plan
Earn 5 Reward Points on select categories like airlines, hotels, restaurants, international spends and travel agencies
Earn 2 on all other retail spends
Value of each reward point is 20 paise. A minimum of 2,000 reward points will be required for cash value redemption.
Reward Redemption
Once you have accumulated reward points depending on your chosen plan, you can redeem them from a range of redemption options like air tickets, 10 000 merchandise, mobile recharge and more through easyrewardz by converting Privy League Credit Card points in to easy points.
You also have an option of auto redemption, wherein every time you accumulate 400 reward points, Rs 80 gets credited to your account every 3 months
Each reward point is valued 20 paise. A minimum of 2,000 reward points will be required for cash value redemption.

International Lounge Access Powered by Priority Pass
With a complimentary Priority Pass Membership and 4 free visits, you get VIP access* to over 1300 VIP lounges in more than 148 countries and 600 cities worldwide. Enjoy complimentary refreshments, free internet access and a relaxed ambience, so your wait at airports are made more comfortable.
Variant
Benefit
Annual Savings
Free
Priority Pass Membership (First year only)
Membership worth USD 99 (approx Rs. 7,425  + GST)
Paid
Priority Pass Membership with 4 complimentary accesses every year
Membership worth USD 99 (approx Rs 7,425  + GST) + 4 visits @USD 27 each (approx Rs 8,100) = Savings of Rs 15,525 approx
*Terms and conditions:
Complimentary visits are applicable only for the primary card holders.
Please note, w.e.f. 01st October, guest charges and charges after complimentary visits are exhausted, will be revised to $35 per guest, per visit.
While signing the visit voucher, customer to check whether the number of guest entered is accurate. In case there are no guest, strike off or mention NA.
Customer to retain a copy of the visit voucher for 3 months.
Change in international lounge access: Effective 20th June 2023, you can access international airport lounges by presenting your credit card. Priority Pass card will no longer be required. Visit validation charges of $1.00 will be debited. These will be auto reversed to your card within 7 working days. Please activate international transactions (Online & in store/ POS) using your Kotak Bank Mobile App or Net Banking to enable this transaction and access international lounges.
For Cards issued till June 01, 2023, Priority Pass Cards will be deactivated on June 20, 2023. Access international lounges by presenting the Credit Card.
For Cards issued after June 01, 2023, Priority Pass card will not be issued. International lounges can be accessed by presenting the Credit Card starting from 20th June 2023.
Click here for applicable terms and conditions on Lounge Access.
For Priority Pass Lounge Directory,  Click here
Domestic Lounge Access Powered by select
Get 2 complimentary visits every quarter to select lounges in India. You can access lounges in India by presenting your Kotak Privy League Signature Credit Card.
Enjoy benefits such as gourmet meal, comfortable seating, widescreen TVs, newspaper and magazines, free Wi-Fi.
For more details,  Click here
Bonus reward points! (Only for paid card)#
You will get bonus reward points on activation every month. If you spend minimum Rs 1000 every month, you would be eligible for 6400 reward points for that quarter. E.g. You spend Rs. 1000 in April, May and June, you will get 6400 extra reward points in the month of July.
# Crediting of reward points in lieu of 4 PVR tickets is an interim change in the feature of the card
For milestone benefits, all transactions settled during milestone period will be considered. Example- Milestone period is 1 st Jan 2021 to 30 th June 2021, then the transactions settled till 30th June 2021 will be considered for milestone benefits”. Any transaction settled on 01st July will not be considered under milestone period.
Benefits Don’t Stop
Instant Assistance through premium concierge services to you.
These services include:
Arranging reservations for hotel and dining
Flight ticketing assistance
Booking tickets for special events and performances
Spa & Fitness Centre information
Referral assistance
To Book or for any queries please call at +91 1135124242 or write to [email protected] available from 10 am to 8 pm on all days
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Save 1% fuel surcharge across all petrol pumps in India*
*Fuel surcharge to be waived only for transactions between the values Rs. 400-Rs.7500. Maximum fuel surcharge waiver of Rs. 4500 in a calendar year (Free variant) and Rs. 300 per month (Paid variant)
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Get 1.8% to 2.5% railway surcharge waiver when you book a ticket on www.irctc.co.in or through an Indian Railways booking counter*
*Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs 500
Attractive EMI options
You can convert any purchase above Rs.2500 to easy EMIs. For more details, Click here
Balance transfer
You can transfer all your outstanding amount from other credit cards to Privy League VISA Signature Credit Card with a processing fee of Rs.349 plus service tax per Rs.10,000 and enjoy 3 Month interest free period.
Disclaimer : We have discontinued Privy League Signature Credit Card for new sourcing and the information above is displayed for existing cardholders only. We are sure that our large bouquet of active products with attractive features and offers will match your expectation. Thank you for understanding.

Corporate Wealth Signature Credit Card
Enjoy a superior banking experience with the Kotak Wealth Corporate Credit Card. Earn higher cashbacks, interest free funds and much more.
Higher Earnings
Interest-free funds
Hassle-Free Spends
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Airport Lounge Access
Universal Acceptability
Higher Earnings
Earn high cash back when spent through your Kotak Corporate Wealth Signature Credit Card.
Interest-Free Funds
Make the most of interest-free funds for up to a period of 48 days similar to an overdraft facility on credit cards.
Hassle-Free Spends
Eliminate the inconvenience of carrying cash as your corporate expense is payable by the company.
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Applicable on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3000.
Maximum fuel surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 3500.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge waiver for transactions on www.irctc.co.in and for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 500/-.
Easy Redemption
Redeem your points every quarter by simply calling the Customer Service Desk and the cash rebate will be credited in your next billing cycle.
Airport Lounge Access
Get 2 complimentary visits every quarter to select lounges in India.
Enjoy benefits such as gourmet meal, comfortable seating, widescreen TVs, newspaper and magazines, free Wi-Fi. Know More
Universal Acceptability
Swipe this International Signature Corporate Credit Card worldwide as its reach extends to 10 million merchants across the globe
Ease Of Expense
Utilise your Kotak Corporate Wealth Signature Credit Card at various business-related spend opportunities such as Sales Meets, Association Meetings, Conferences, and Business & Executive Meetings.
Easy To Employees
Spend carefree through your Kotak Corporate Wealth Signature Credit Card without the worry of late payment fees or outstanding dues as the Company bears your professional expenses.
Power To Company
Seize opportunities for savings and budgeting along with the benefits of reduced company costs, increased control over spends and monitored spending patterns.
Expense Management with Kotak Visa Intellilink
Budget your expenses according to spends done on corporate cards with vendor-wise tracking done by employees. Analyze the amount spent by each employee through statistical data which can be retrieved at any time to see which employee has spent where and how much.
Customized Company Name
Personalise your Kotak Corporate Wealth Signature Credit Card with the company name as a key differentiator between corporate and personal card.
Deciding The Card Limit
With the Company receiving an overall spend limit, which can be distributed amongst the employees on the basis of hierarchy, designation or employer's will.
Consolidated Payment
Avoid hassles of separate payments, as only one payment is to be made for all the Corporate Credit Cards of the employees in a company.
Dedicated Service Manager
Have the privilege of personalised service as your Dedicated Manager brings you quick information on card details, card limits and lost/stolen cards.
Real Time Alerts
Feel safe and secure with free SMS and e-mail alerts on all transactions.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a credit card balance transfer?
Credit card balance transfer is the process of transferring owed balance from one credit card account to another. Upon carrying out this process, the debt is owed to the new card issuer as opposed to the original card issuer.
Why should I select a Kotak Credit Card?
Kotak Credit Cards symbolize the following guiding principles:
Simplicity
Kotak Credit Cards are simple to understand and use. We have taken special care to make them hassle free so that you can spend time on more important things in life that require your attention.
Transparency
Kotak Credit Cards are transparent in communicating upfront what the card offers and what you would have to spend for it, if at all. We have taken care that there will be no hidden charges associated with this card.
Relevance
Kotak Credit Cards have understood what you need the most from your credit card , and have been designed to give you only those benefits that are most relevant for you.
This promise from Kotak ensures that you only get the best from your credit card!

Do I have to use this card only for my official expenses?
This card is specifically meant for official purpose. However you can use this card for personal expenses which will purely depend on the policy of your corporate that has availed the CORPORATE CARD OPTION. This is more so as the consolidated bill will also include any personal spends done on a corporate card and the expenses for the same will have to be settled between you and your company.

Is the cash withdrawal feature active on the card?
Cash withdrawal feature is not active on the card.

NRI Royale Signature Credit Card
With the Kotak NRI Royale Signature Card, you’ve found a Credit Card that gives you your biggest return as an NRI. With a host of customised features, you can enjoy benefits that are tailor-made for Indians abroad.
Earn 2 rewards on international spends
Freedom to purchase and pay in INR
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Gift an add-on Card
NRI Royale Shield
2 Rewards on International Spends
Earn 2 rewards on spends outside India; i.e. earn 2 rewards points for every Rs. 200/- spent
Earn 1 reward point for every Rs. 200/- spent within India
Accumulate your reward points and redeem them across a host of redemption options like Movie tickets, Air tickets, cash and more.
1 Reward Point = Re 1/-
Freedom to Purchase and pay in INR
While traveling to India, save the mark-up fee charged on your credit card issued outside India or the hassles of currency exchange
Enjoy the benefit of paying for your purchases, travel and dining in Indian Rupees
Fuel Surcharge Waiver
Applicable on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3000.
Maximum fuel surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 3500.
Railway Surcharge Waiver
Save railway surcharge waiver for transactions on www.irctc.co.in and for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters. Maximum railway surcharge waiver allowed in a calendar year is Rs. 500/-.
Gift an Add-on Card
Gift an add-on card to your spouse, parents or children (above 18 years) and extend the benefits of the NRI Royale Card to your loved ones
The add-on card would be issued irrespective of location or citizenship status
One-time fee of Rs. 599/- per add-on card is applicable
Travel with comfort
Airport Lounge Access : Get 2 complimentary visits every quarter to select lounges in India. Enjoy benefits such as gourmet meal, comfortable seating, widescreen TVs, newspaper and magazines, free Wi-Fi. Know more

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a credit card balance transfer?
Credit card balance transfer is the process of transferring owed balance from one credit card account to another. Upon carrying out this process, the debt is owed to the new card issuer as opposed to the original card issuer.
Why should I select a Kotak Credit Card?
Kotak Credit Cards symbolize the following guiding principles:
Simplicity
Kotak Credit Cards are simple to understand and use. We have taken special care to make them hassle free so that you can spend time on more important things in life that require your attention.
Transparency
Kotak Credit Cards are transparent in communicating upfront what the card offers and what you would have to spend for it, if at all. We have taken care that there will be no hidden charges associated with this card.
Relevance
Kotak Credit Cards have understood what you need the most from your credit card , and have been designed to give you only those benefits that are most relevant for you.
This promise from Kotak ensures that you only get the best from your credit card!

Kotak Biz credit card
Kotak Biz Credit card is designed to manage your business expenses seamlessly, don’t believe us?  Let us show you how:
Exciting Rewards Programme
Airport Lounge Access
Fuel & Railway Surcharge Waiver
Enhanced Card Security
Curated Alliances Programme
Exciting Rewards Programme
Earn 4 reward points for every Rs.100 on categories like Travel and Tour Operators & Domestic Airlines, Direct Marketing/Advertising services, Supermarket, Lodging – Hotels, Motels, Resorts*
Earn 1 reward points for every Rs.100 on all other spends^
Refer to the below table for categories related to accelerated reward points**.
Category
Reward points
Travel and Tour Operators & Domestic Airlines
4
Direct Marketing/Advertising services
4
Super Market
4
Lodging – Hotels, Motels, Resorts
4
*Posting of the Reward points earned on all transactions done within a billing cycle will reflect in that respective month’s statement.
**Each category mentioned in the above table has a Merchant category code (MCC) which are defined by Visa. Transactions on all merchants having the above MCCs will be applicable for accelerated reward points.
Note:
With effect from 01st June 2025, cash value for redemption will be revised from ₹0.25 to ₹0.20 per reward point. For redemption against categories like Mobile Recharge, Shopping, etc, 1 Reward Point = ₹0.25
A minimum of ₹2,000 Reward Points will be required for cash value redemption
^On wallet loading, fuel, rent and online-based gaming, reward points are not applicable
For further details on reward points, categories they can be earned on, and the capping for each category, please read the  Most Important Terms & Conditions .
Travel with comfort
Get complimentary access to select domestic airport lounges per calendar quarter on spends of Rs. 75, 000 or more in the previous calendar quarter
To explore the list of the participating lounges, please  click here .
Fuel & Railway Surcharge Waiver
In case of transactions of Rs. 500 to Rs. 5000, 1% fuel surcharge will be waived. The maximum fuel surcharge waiver of Rs. 2500 is available in a calendar year.
Save railway surcharge of 1.8% for transactions on www.irtc.co.in and 2.5% for transactions on Indian Railways Booking Counters.
The maximum railway surcharge waiver that is allowed in a calendar year is Rs.500/-.

Click here  for insurance policy details & Claim process
In case of lost/stolen card or any suspicious transaction on your kotak card, you are required to immediately call Customer Contact Centre 1800 266 4545 (local call rates apply) or write to [email protected] and get your credit card deactivated / blocked to prevent misuse and register a claim with the Insurance Company.
Claim documents are to be submitted by Card holder within 60 days from the date of intimation on the above number.
Enhanced Card Security
Safety features:
Embedded EMV Chip lends an additional level of security
6-digit PIN authentication for higher security of your transactions
Interest Free period Upto 48 days
Fees:
Joining Fee: Rs 299
Annual Fee: Rs 499
For all other charges, refer MITC

Frequently Asked Questions
Why should I select a Kotak Credit Card?
Kotak Credit Cards symbolize the following guiding principles:
Simplicity
Kotak Credit Cards are simple to understand and use. We have taken special care to make them hassle free so that you can spend time on more important things in life that require your attention.
Transparency
Kotak Credit Cards are transparent in communicating upfront what the Card offers and what you would have to spend for it, if at all. We have taken care that there will be no hidden charges associated with this Card.
Relevance
Kotak Credit Cards have understood what you need the most from your credit Card, and have been designed to give you only those benefits that are most relevant for you.
This promise from Kotak ensures that you only get the best from your credit Card!
Whom has the Kotak Biz credit card been designed for?
The Kotak Biz credit card has been specifically designed for the Self Employed, Proprietors and Partners of Partnership firms
Feature and benefit of the card have been specifically been designed to manage the business expenses.
What type of card is Kotak Biz credit card?
The Kotak Biz credit card is a VISA Platinum card.
Is this card valid internationally?
Yes, the Kotak Biz credit card is valid internationally.
Do I enjoy any interest free period on retail?
Yes, you enjoy an interest free period on retail transactions of up to 48 days.
